zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de DONZY於1100年1月7日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多時，她的父親Hervé de DONZY II21歲，母親Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON51歲。她於1129年與Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1155年3月30日在法國崔英德-吉洛易安波享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de DONZY于1100年1月7日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾尼艾福多时，她的父亲Hervé de DONZY II21岁，母亲Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON51岁。她于1129年与Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1155年3月30日在法国崔英德-吉洛易安波享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: DONZY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall): of uncertain origin. There is a Richard Donowe recorded in 1451-64 as a tenant in Manuels, Saint Columb Minor, whose surname appears to be a pet form of an unidentified personal name with the Cornish hypocoristic suffix -ow. Formally this might have become Doney but Donowe itself seems not to have survived, unless it was altered to Downey . However, there is no evidence to suggest any connection of this west Cornwall surname with Doney in central and east Cornwall (Bodmin and Quethiock). Alternatively, perhaps it is a variant of the Devon name Downey , and with the main vowel shortened and lowered, but evidence for this is lacking.
Americanized form of French Canadian   Daunais   or   Donais  .

variants.name: Downey
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Dúnadhaigh ‘descendant of Dúnadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘fortress-holder’ (from dún ‘fortress, fortified hill’).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maol Dhomhnaigh, or of Mac Giolla Dhomnaigh (see Maloney ).
Scottish: habitational name from the Scottish barony of Downie or Duny in the parish of Monikie in Angus (on Tayside), named from Gaelic dùn ‘hill’ + the locative suffix -ach.

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de DONZY was born on 7 January 1100, in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Hervé de DONZY II, was 21 and her mother, Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, was 51. She married Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II in 1129. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 30 March 1155, in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de DONZY est née le 7 janvier 1100, à Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hervé de DONZY II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II en 1129. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1155, à Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de DONZY am 7. Januar 1100 in Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hervé de DONZY II 21 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON 51. Sie hat 1129 Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. März 1155 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de DONZY è nata il il 7 gennaio 1100 nel Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Hervé de DONZY II, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II nel 1129. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 30 marzo 1155, nel Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de DONZYが1100年1月7日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeニevアドンズイで生まれた時，父Hervé de DONZY IIは21歳，母Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILONは51歳であった。1129年にSulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1155年3月30日にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーアンボイゼで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de DONZY(이)가 1100년 1월 7일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 니e브르 돈즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hervé de DONZY II(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1129년 Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1155년 3월 30일 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 아보이스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.7 JAN 1100–30 MAR 1155: 7 de janeiro de 1100–30 de março de 1155
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de DONZY nasceu em 7 de janeiro de 1100, em Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hervé de DONZY II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II em 1129. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de março de 1155, em Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de DONZY родилась 7 января 1100 г. в местности донзи, ниeвр, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Hervé de DONZY II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II в 1129 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 30 марта 1155 г. в местности эмбоис, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.7 JAN 1100–30 MAR 1155: 7 de enero de 1100–30 de marzo de 1155
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de DONZY nació el 7 de enero de 1100, en Donzy, Nièvre, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hervé de DONZY II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mathilde de LA FERTE-MILON, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II en 1129. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1155, en Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
